signals.headline: Flagg, Dallas Mavericks' No
signals.raw: Flagg, Dallas Mavericks' No. 1 pick from the 2025 Draft, became the youngest player (age 19) and only teenager in NBA history to score 50+ points, dropping 51 on 19/30 FG in a 138-127 loss to Orlando Magic on Friday night[1].
matched_markets: NBA Playoffs: Who Will Win Series? - Pistons vs. Magic

signals.headline: This marks his third 40+ point game this season, trailing only Michael Jordan (7) and Allen Iverson (5) among rookies si
signals.raw: This marks his third 40+ point game this season, trailing only Michael Jordan (7) and Allen Iverson (5) among rookies since 1976; Kon Knueppel remains the frontrunner, but Flagg's performance "makes the race interesting," potentially shifting prediction markets on ROY odds[1].
